name: Liberty Savings Bank, F.S.B.
description_short: Community bank serving Sarasota, Manatee, and Venice, Florida with personal and business banking, mortgages, and home loans since 1990+.
description_long:
Liberty Savings Bank, F.S.B. is a regional community bank operating in the Sarasota and Manatee County areas of Florida, with multiple financial centers in Bradenton, Venice, Sarasota, and Lakewood Ranch. The bank has built its reputation over 30+ years by focusing on personalized service and community involvement rather than purely transactional banking. The institution has received recognition from Forbes and Fortune as among "Florida's Best in Banking" and has been voted "Best of SRQ" and "Best of Venice" by local residents. Liberty Savings Bank is FDIC-insured, backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government.

The bank offers a comprehensive suite of consumer and business banking products. On the personal side, customers can access checking and savings accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs), credit cards with rewards programs, and online/mobile banking. The mortgage division is substantial, offering fixed-rate mortgages, adjustable-rate mortgages, jumbo loans, home equity lines of credit (HELOCs), and refinancing options. The bank also provides personal loans and commercial/business loans. Business customers can access business checking, savings and CDs, and Visa business check cards. All deposit accounts are FDIC-insured.

Liberty Savings Bank distinguishes itself through active community engagement and personalized service. The bank sponsors community events like block parties, provides free educational seminars for business owners, and partners with organizations like Habitat for Humanity. Multiple specialized home loan teams are assigned to specific geographic areas (Bradenton/Wildewood, Sarasota/Stickney, Sarasota/Square South, Lakewood Ranch, and Venice), suggesting relationship-based mortgage lending rather than purely automated processing. The bank emphasizes that "our interest is in you" and positions itself as a "neighbors over numbers" institution.

Liberty Savings Bank is best suited for customers seeking a traditional community bank experience with personal relationships and local decision-making, particularly those in the Sarasota and Manatee County areas. The bank's extensive mortgage offerings and specialized home loan teams make it particularly strong for home buyers and refinancing customers. However, as a regional institution, it offers limited geographic reach compared to national banks, and the website does not provide comprehensive fee schedules, APR ranges, or competitive rate information, making it difficult for consumers to compare pricing before applying. The bank's focus on community banking may also mean fewer digital-first features compared to newer fintech competitors. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Personal credit cards with rewards programs
Online and mobile banking with bill pay
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
30+ year history serving Sarasota and Manatee communities with recognized local reputation
Multiple specialized home loan teams organized by geographic region for personalized mortgage service
Comprehensive mortgage products including fixed-rate, adjustable-rate, jumbo loans, HELOC, and refinancing options
Forbes and Fortune recognition as among "Florida's Best in Banking" plus local "Best of SRQ" and "Best of Venice" awards
Free educational seminars and community events for customers (Lunch and Learn seminars, block parties)
Online and mobile banking with multiple login options including touch authentication and facial recognition
cons: Limited geographic footprint restricted to Sarasota, Manatee, and Venice areas of Florida—not suitable for customers outside this region
Website does not display specific APR ranges, interest rates, or fee schedules for any products, making rate comparison difficult
No information provided about minimum account balances, monthly maintenance fees, or CD rate terms
Mortgage loan administration uses separate portal (libertysavingsbank.loanadministration.com) adding complexity for existing mortgage customers
Online banking maintenance window (midnight-5am Sunday) indicates potential platform limitations compared to 24/7 neobanks
best_for: Florida residents in Sarasota, Manatee, or Venice counties seeking personalized community banking relationships
Home buyers and refinancers in the service area looking for local mortgage specialists and relationship-based lending
Small business owners in the region wanting to build banking relationships and access free business education events
Customers who prioritize community involvement and local decision-making over digital-first or national banking convenience
diagnosis: Liberty Savings Bank is best for consumers in the Sarasota, Manatee, and Venice, Florida area who value personalized, relationship-based banking and community involvement, particularly those seeking mortgage services from locally-based loan officers. The main caveat is that geographic service limitations make this bank unsuitable for customers outside its core Florida markets, and the lack of transparent fee and rate information on the website makes it difficult to assess competitiveness before committing to an application.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
